name: Vanilla Crazy Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
Preparation Time: 0:40
Heat oven to 350°F. In an 8-inch square baking pan, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In a small bowl, with a wire whisk, stir together egg and vanilla. Make two indentations in the flour mixture; pour oil into one and the egg mixture into the other. Add milk; stir until well mixed. Stir in chopped pecans. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Sprinkle chocolate chips on warm cake. Let stand 2 minutes; slightly swirl melted chips.
